privileged_info_summary: This is a synthetic contact consolidation task with 100 total entries (40 from EventPlatform1_Export, 35 from EventPlatform2_Export, 25 from ManualEntry_SignUp). The data contains 72 unique email addresses with 28 duplicate entries across sources. Key verified facts: timeout is 300 seconds, max steps is 15, difficulty is medium, all 100 entries have valid email addresses (29 missing phone numbers), 10 email addresses show mixed capitalization variations across sources, multiple inconsistent phone number formats exist ('(555) 123-4567', '555-123-4567', '5551234567', '555 890 1234'), and 7 entries in the manual source use email display name format. IMPORTANT DISCREPANCY: The README claims expected result of '~60-65 unique contacts' but the actual data contains 72 unique email addresses (28% reduction from 100), which falls below the verifier requirement of 30-60% reduction. All data is entirely synthetic, created by setup_task.sh without external downloads.
